#  View Change Events Summary (Android) 
##  Background 
The Change Events Summary displays a high-level summary for all items that are related to that particular change event.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher the Change Events tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * The Change Events Summary view is "sticky," meaning if you leave the Change Events tool on the Summary view, this view will persist when you return to the Change Events view.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Change Event (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-android/tutorials/create-a-change-event-android)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Events** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the change event to view its summary.  
![Change Event Details Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4f0294ee166b9c5192f50581f0cc407a/44b22063d68a610d293b842b7f62ca37/change-event-details-android.png?fm=webp)


## See Also
  * [Add a Line Item to a Change Event (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-android/tutorials/add-a-line-item-to-a-change-event-android)
  * [Search and Filter for Change Events (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-android/tutorials/search-and-filter-for-change-events-android)
  * [Create a Change Event (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-android/tutorials/create-a-change-event-android)
title: View Change Events Summary (Android)
description: How to view a change event's summary using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
